sections.paragraph:
Original: צלף

Transliteration: tsâlâph

Phonetic: tsaw-lawf'

BDB Definition:

Zalaph = "wound"
  1. father of Hanun who assisted in rebuilding the city wall of Jerusalem after the return from exile

Origin: from an unused root of unknown meaning

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
